

# Welcome
<a name="what-is-eventbridge-schemas"></a>

Welcome to the *Amazon EventBridge Schema Registry API Reference*.

The Amazon EventBridge Schema Registry allows you to discover, create, and manage OpenAPI schemas for events on EventBridge. Using these API actions you can find schemas for existing AWS services, create and upload custom schemas, or generate a schema based on messages on an event bus. You can download code bindings for popular languages for all schemas in EventBridge to quickly build applications that use those events. 

**Note**  
Inactive schemas will be deleted after two years.

For more information on Amazon EventBridge, and managing schemas in the EventBridge console, see the following.
+ [Amazon EventBridge Schema Registry](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eventbridge/latest/userguide/eventbridge-schemas.html)
+ [Tutorial: Download code bindings for events using the EventBridge schema registry ](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eventbridge/latest/userguide/eb-schema-download-binding-tutorial.html)
